name: avatar
description: A profile image that degrades gracefully: a skeleton while it loads, the image once ready, and the person's initials (or a glyph) if there's no image or it fails. Labelled for assistive tech either way.

notes: When the image renders it carries alt text, defaulting to the name
The initials fallback is exposed as role=img labelled with the name, so the person is announced either way
With no name and no src the avatar is purely decorative and hidden from assistive tech
The loading skeleton is decorative (aria-hidden) and respects prefers-reduced-motion

intents: a profile picture that falls back to initials when the image is missing or fails
a user avatar with a loading state for the image
